description: Upgrades forbotsake to the latest version. Pulls newest skills, bugfixes, and features from the repo.

cases.query: Upgrade forbotsake to the latest version. I want the newest skills and any bugfixes.
Update forbotsake. I'm on an old version and want to pull the latest changes.
Get the latest version of forbotsake. I think there were new skills added recently.
forbotsake-upgrade. Pull the latest from the repo and reinstall.
Is forbotsake up to date? Check if there's a newer version and upgrade if so.
I want the newest forbotsake features. Run the upgrade process to get me current.
Update my marketing skills. I saw a new version of forbotsake was released and want to pull it.
Pull the latest forbotsake. My installed version is behind and I want the newest skills.
Upgrade my forbotsake installation. I heard there are new adversarial review gates in the latest release.
Get forbotsake up to date. Run whatever install or upgrade process is needed.
Do marketing for this project. Handle everything from strategy to publishing automatically.
How should I market this? I need a full go-to-market strategy with positioning and channels.
Review my marketing strategy. Challenge the positioning and channel choices.
Write a Twitter thread about our latest feature release. Make it developer-focused.
What worked this week? Run a marketing retro on my recent posts.
Publish this post to LinkedIn. It's reviewed and ready to go live now.
